metadata.description: Status HUD for Claude Code — context bar, native cost tracking, TPM, token counts, agent/skill stats, git status. Pure bash + jq.

plugins.name: meicento-hud
plugins.description: Multi-line status line: session (model, context dot bar, tokens, rate limits, team mode), cost (native USD with burn rate, TPM), stats (tool/agent/skill counts, cache breakdown, todos), project (directory:branch, duration). Pure bash + jq, no Node.js required.
